  • Method Details

    • accruedInterestAmount

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark.Builder accruedInterestAmount(RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMarkAccruedInterestAmount accruedInterestAmount)
      The amount of accrued interest estimated to be exchanged given the requested quantity. Measured in a USD value with 2-decimal places of precision.

    • accruedInterestAmount

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark.Builder accruedInterestAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMarkAccruedInterestAmount> accruedInterestAmount)
      The amount of accrued interest estimated to be exchanged given the requested quantity. Measured in a USD value with 2-decimal places of precision.

    • assetId

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark.Builder assetId(String assetId)
      Apex Asset ID for this asset.

    • assetId

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark.Builder assetId(Optional<String> assetId)
      Apex Asset ID for this asset.

    • identifier

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark.Builder identifier(String identifier)
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • identifier

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark.Builder identifier(Optional<String> identifier)
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • identifierType

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark.Builder identifierType(RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMarkIdentifierType identifierType)
      The identifier type of the asset being sought. This will be the same value as what was sent on the request.

    • identifierType

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark.Builder identifierType(Optional<? extends RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMarkIdentifierType> identifierType)
      The identifier type of the asset being sought. This will be the same value as what was sent on the request.

    • markAbsenceReason

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark.Builder markAbsenceReason(MarkAbsenceReason markAbsenceReason)
      When marks are found and returned, this will be unspecified. If the asset was found, but no pricing data is returned, then: this will denote the reason, the marks[] list will be empty, and the accrued_interest_amount will not be present.

    • markAbsenceReason

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark.Builder markAbsenceReason(Optional<? extends MarkAbsenceReason> markAbsenceReason)
      When marks are found and returned, this will be unspecified. If the asset was found, but no pricing data is returned, then: this will denote the reason, the marks[] list will be empty, and the accrued_interest_amount will not be present.

    • markGenerationTime

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark.Builder markGenerationTime(OffsetDateTime markGenerationTime)
      The time this mark data was generated

    • markGenerationTime

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark.Builder markGenerationTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> markGenerationTime)
      The time this mark data was generated

    • marks

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark.Builder marks(List<MarkPrice> marks)
      The set of marks available for this asset. If this is non-empty, then it will always contain a PERCENTAGE_OF_PAR typed price in it. Yield prices may not always be available, but never be present without a percentage of par value also returned.

    • marks

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark.Builder marks(Optional<? extends List<MarkPrice>> marks)
      The set of marks available for this asset. If this is non-empty, then it will always contain a PERCENTAGE_OF_PAR typed price in it. Yield prices may not always be available, but never be present without a percentage of par value also returned.

    • build

      public RetrieveFixedIncomeMarksResponseAssetMark build()
